rulings.Case Title: SHAKER AHMED VS. RAYMOND A. RAMIREZ ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday February 25, 2019 line 1. PLAINTIFF SHAKER AHMED MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD GRANTED. Counsel to prepare order. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ROBERT REEVES VS. SOPHIE LAU ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday February 25, 2019 line 2. DEFENDANT SOPHIE LAU, JEFFREY LAU, KENNAN LAU Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs Complaint GRANTED with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege facts giving rise to malice, oppression or fraud. Conclusory allegations lacking factual support (e.g. paragraph 10) are not enough. Plaintiff fails to cite any authority for the proposition that every failure to perform repairs (e.g. intercom) rises to the level warranting punitive damages. The Court notes that opposition does not cite a single case. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MASAZUMI INOUE ET AL VS. BANK OF AMERICA, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday February 25, 2019 line 3. DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION, MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS, INC., U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION, AS TRUSTEE DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED without leave to amend. The Statute of Limitations has run to challenge the 2011 Assignment. Any alleged recent assignment to US Bank, according to Plaintiff, would only be improper is 2011 Assignment was improper. Since the Statute of Limitations to challenge the 2011 assignment has run, this action as a whole is barred. Plaintiff cites no authority for the proposition that the latest assignment somehow revives the barred claims. Further, Plaintiff cites no authority for the proposition that this pre-foreclosure claim may be brought. Finally, according to Plaintiff the note and the Deed of Trust were sold to the sponsor of The Morgan Stanley Mortgage Loan Trust 2006-AR for the purpose of including the loan into that Trust. 2011 Assignment placed the loan in the hands of the Trustee of The Morgan Stanley Mortgage Loan Trust 2006-AR, thus the loan ended up where it was intended to be since April 28, 2006. The foreclosing entity is one that was an intended beneficial owner according to Plaintiffs allegations and arguments in opposition. (See Opposition 1: 23-26 and 3:3-15). Ratcliff v. JP Morgan Chase 2017 WL 2876141. =(501/REQ)
